The Other Boleyn Girl (2008)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $26,814,957Details
International Box Office $51,455,013
Worldwide Box Office $78,269,970
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $9,915,909
Total $9,915,909
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$8,203,061 (30.6% of total gross)
Legs:3.27 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:34.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$40,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.0 times production budget)
Theater counts:1,166 opening theaters/1,212 max. theaters, 5.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $44,666,701

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 29th, 2008 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
Video Release: June 10th, 2008 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for mature thematic elements, sexual content and some violent images
Running Time: 115 minutes
Plot point: Dysfunctional Family, Infidelity, Pregnant Women, Relationships Gone Wrong, Religious, Royalty, Troubled Pregnancy or Miscarriage
Subgenre: Historical Drama
Time period setting: 1500s
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Historical Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Universal Pictures International, Columbia Pictures, BBC Films, Relativity Media, Ruby Films, Scott Rudin Productions
Production Countries: United Kingdom
Languages: English
